headline: Is Verizon Communications (VZ) One of the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.03%, Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) engages in the provision of communications, technology, information, and streaming products and services to consumers, businesses, and governmental entities worldwide.
